communication_log.note: WO-RAG-INDEX-TWO-GRAIN-DROP-001 created. Bulletproof concept #6. Phase 1 audit ready.

Phase 1 audit complete. CRITICAL DISCOVERY: file-grain pseudo-nodes in graph.json carry zero headerStatus data (0/362 nodes). buildFileHeaderStatusMap replacement with file-grain nodes is impossible. buildFileHeaderFactMap has no graph-node equivalent. Replacement is possible using element-grain graph nodes (same grain, different source object) but does not change grain type. Options A/B/C surfaced to ORCHESTRATOR. HARD STOP — awaiting Phase 2 ruling.
